title: NorvesEditor Bridge Common Definitions
description: Shared $defs reused by per-method and per-event payload schemas. This file defines no top-level instance shape; consumers reference its $defs by absolute $id, e.g. https://norveseditor.dev/bridge/spec/schema/common.schema.json#/$defs/logLevel. Generic protocol only: no NorvesLib-specific fields appear here.

versionString.description: Protocol or product version string in MAJOR.MINOR form.

capabilityToken.description: Namespaced capability token, e.g. runtime.control or log.stream. Same lowerCamel.member shape as method/event names.

capabilityDescriptor.description: Authoritative description of one capability the engine endpoint advertises.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of the capability.

engineState.description: Engine lifecycle state from the engine's own perspective. Distinct from the editor-backend-owned process state.

runtimeState.description: Runtime play/pause/stop state reported by the engine. Used by runtime.stateChanged and status snapshots.

viewportState.description: State of the engine's external native viewport window. Generic OS-window concepts only; no NorvesLib-specific values.

origin.description: Which side produced an event or error. Lifecycle events may be engine-wire or editor-backend-synthesized; see protocol-overview.md.

objectId.description: Opaque identifier of a scene object/node. Generic string handle; not a live-memory reference or engine pointer.

propertyValue.description: Generic serialized property value: a plain JSON value (string/number/boolean/null/array/object). A snapshot copy, never a reference into engine live memory. Structured values use generic arrays/objects without engine-specific type names.

propertyEntry.description: One generic name->value entry in an object property snapshot.

value.description: Snapshot copy of the property value.

valueType.description: Optional free-form type label sharing the same vocabulary as schema.getSnapshot's valueType. Not enumerated, to avoid binding to one engine's type set.

propertyBag.description: Ordered collection of generic property entries forming an object's serialized property snapshot. May be empty.

propertyDefinition.description: Generic definition of one property exposed by a type in schema.getSnapshot. Describes name and value type, not a concrete value.

valueType.description: Free-form generic type label for this property's value.

typeDescriptor.description: Generic description of one object/component type the engine exposes. typeName is a free-form generic label; no NorvesLib-specific names appear.

typeName.description: Free-form generic name of the type.

kind.description: Optional generic classification, e.g. object or component. Free-form.

properties.description: Optional property definitions for this type.

assetEntry.description: Generic asset manifest entry. A serialized DTO copy, not a reference into engine live memory.

cookedVersion.description: Optional cooked artifact version (non-negative integer; matches NorvesLib uint32 and the offline manifest DTO).

sceneNode.description: Recursive generic node in a scene tree snapshot. A serialized DTO copy, not a live engine pointer. children self-references this $def.

kind.description: Optional generic node classification (free-form, not a NorvesLib type name).

children.description: Optional child nodes; recursion via self-$ref. Absent or empty means a leaf.
